evals.prompt: Run a security audit. Workspace: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/stride-sentinel-channels/.rawgentic_workspace.json, project: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/stride-sentinel-channels/projects/sentinel-app. Focus on the data channels. Save a transcript to the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: Agent enumerates config data channels (grpc-api, mqtt-broker, sentinel-ws), applies STRIDE to them, uses config auth mechanisms
expectations: Enumerates grpc-api AND mqtt-broker AND sentinel-ws from config
STRIDE analysis applied to config channels (not Express/Socket.IO defaults)
References auth mechanisms from config.security (mTLS, OAuth2-PKCE)

evals.prompt: Run a security audit. Workspace: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/learning-config-update/.rawgentic_workspace.json, project: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/learning-config-update/projects/sentinel-app. The audit should discover that the app also uses API key auth for the webhook endpoint. Save a transcript to the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers new auth mechanism and appends it to config.security.authMechanisms[]
expectations: New auth mechanism added to config.security.authMechanisms[] array

evals.prompt: Run a security audit. Workspace: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/research-project-type/.rawgentic_workspace.json, project: /tmp/rawgentic-security-audit-test/research-project-type/projects/research-proj. This is a research project with no deployed services. Save a transcript to the outputs directory.
evals.expected_output: Agent adapts audit for research project type - focuses on data security rather than deployment
expectations: Adapts for research project (no deployment audit)
Focuses on data handling, research data, or access controls
